parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Notifiarr destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise notifiarr:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Notifiarr apprise notification payload delivered straight to notifiarr.com.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Notifiarr destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Notifiarr apprise API (no Apprise relay)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Notifiarr apikey

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Notifiarr targets
